records.ety: [F., fr. L. membrana the skin that covers the separate members of the body, fr. L. membrum. See Member.]

defs: A thin layer or fold of tissue, usually supported by a fibrous network, serving to cover or line some part or organ, and often secreting or absorbing certain fluids.
notes: ☞ The term is also often applied to the thin, expanded parts, of various texture, both in animals and vegetables.
